title: Bhartiya Shiksha Board Class 10, 12 Results 2026 Out, Here's How To Check
description: Uttarakhand Board Results 2026 (OUT) LIVE: The UBSE Class 10 and Class 12 board examinations for 2026 were conducted from February 21 to March 20, while practical exams were held between January 16 and February 15.
